scope.summary: Bounds the orientation trio with compact discovery, fixed schema projection, server-owned page caps, and explicit continuation metadata.
out_of_scope: The separate full tool-surface R2 byte-budget sweep.
Source-search line caps and source range fetching.

entry_points.name: oracle_capabilities
entry_points.trace: OracleMcpServer parses detail_level, emits the compact default, and preserves the complete descriptor report for detail_level=full.

entry_points.name: oracle_orient
entry_points.trace: OracleDispatcher clamps max_rows to a fixed ceiling, fetches one sentinel row per selected list, and signs an owner/include/profile-bound cursor only when a following page exists.

entry_points.name: get_schema
entry_points.trace: The alias dispatches through a TABLE/VIEW/PACKAGE-only query with a 100-row default, a 250-row server ceiling, and a signed continuation cursor.

limitations: A clean detached worktree at source.sha passed cargo fmt --all -- --check.
The clean-worktree cargo check -p oraclemcp --lib --locked was refused because its committed Cargo.lock requires an update; no clean-tree build pass is claimed.
The required R2 serialized-byte sweep was not run here and remains the independent acceptance lane.
